description: Sovereignty and Financial Infrastructure Layer for Autonomous Agents

errors.401: signature missing, invalid, or address mismatch

endpoints.description: Service health and current execution mode
Live spot rates fetched from Coinbase API with fallback
Provision a new agent wallet with cryptographic keypair and starter balance
warnings: private_key is returned ONCE and never stored by the protocol
agent must persist private_key in secure local storage immediately

endpoints.description: Execute a signed spot swap between USDC and HBAR at live market prices. ZERO protocol fee — swaps are permanently fee-free in this protocol version.
Move USDC from liquid balance to yield vault; 0.25% protocol fee split 80/20

fee_architecture.description: 0.25% of gross deposit amount, split on every vault deposit. Swaps carry zero fee.
fee_architecture.swap_fee_status: ZERO — swaps between USDC and HBAR are permanently fee-free in this protocol version
fee_architecture.alpha_phase_notice: HOLDING_ADDRESS_USER and HOLDING_ADDRESS_BOUNTY are STANDALONE SANDBOX PLACEHOLDERS (effective burn addresses). All fees accumulate in SQLite TreasuryState only during alpha. No on-chain distribution occurs until an L2 governance proposal is ratified.

creator.label: Protocol Creator
creator.alpha_status: STANDALONE SANDBOX PLACEHOLDER — effective burn address, no private key exists, fees are SQLite-only

bounty_pool.label: Agent Bounty Pool
bounty_pool.alpha_status: STANDALONE SANDBOX PLACEHOLDER — effective burn address, no private key exists, fees are SQLite-only
bounty_pool.purpose: Programmatic compute-survival fund accumulating with every deposit; funds open agent bounties

fee_architecture.fee_math: round(amount * rate, 8) for all intermediate values
fee_architecture.mutation_policy: Any PR altering FEE_SPLIT_CREATOR_RATE or FEE_SPLIT_BOUNTY_RATE triggers automated CI rejection

sandbox.trigger: RPC_PROVIDER_URL environment variable unset or empty

live_rpc.trigger: valid Ethereum JSON-RPC URL in RPC_PROVIDER_URL
live_rpc.behaviour: on-chain ETH balance checks + unsigned transaction payload preparation
live_rpc.note: SQLite ledger still tracks agent balances in both modes

agent_onboarding.step_2: Store wallet_address and private_key securely — private_key never retrievable again
agent_onboarding.step_3: GET /api/v1/market/prices — check source field before sizing trades
agent_onboarding.step_4: Sign request body with private_key using EIP-191 personal-sign
agent_onboarding.step_6: Inspect execution_mode in response — sandbox vs live_rpc affects latency and gas

contribution.merge_gate: clean CI run — no private key leaks, no fee evasion, tests pass
